allow: Bash(cat ~/.claude/skills/gstack.md 2>/dev/null || echo "not found at root" && echo "---" && ls ~/.claude/skills/gstack/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -10)
Bash(echo "=== npm ===" && npm view giveready-mcp version)

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://www.giveready.org/mcp/sse -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"0.1"}}}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('MCP version:', d['result']['protocolVersion']\); print\('Server:', d['result']['serverInfo']['name']\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://www.giveready.org/mcp/sse -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; tools=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['result']['tools']; print\(f'tool_count={len\(tools\)}'\); [print\(f'  - {t[\\"name\\"]}'\) for t in tools]")

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://www.giveready.org/mcp/sse -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"search_nonprofits","arguments":{"query":"surf therapy"}}}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['result']; content=json.loads\(r['content'][0]['text']\); print\(f'results: {len\(content[\\"nonprofits\\"]\)}'\); [print\(f'  - {n[\\"name\\"]}'\) for n in content['nonprofits'][:3]]")
Bash(cd ~/TestVentures.net/giveready && ./deploy.sh "ship /guides surface \(handler + minimal markdown parser, no posts yet\)")
Bash(curl -s https://www.giveready.org/guides | grep -c "No guides published yet")
